cosmetics.title: COSMÉTIQUES

cosmetics.instructions: Vérifiez votre inventaire de skins dans le jeu et indiquez combien vous en possédez par rareté. La valeur est calculée automatiquement.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.thirdPartyBody: Teammate and opponent data comes from Supercell public API for aggregate analytics.
privacy.retentionBody: Battles are preserved indefinitely, even after cancellation.
privacy.gdprBody: Request data export or deletion at privacy@brawlvision.com.
privacy.cookiesBody: We use localStorage and Supabase Auth cookies. AdSense sets ad cookies for free users.
privacy.disclaimerBody: BrawlVision is not affiliated with Supercell Oy. Brawl Stars is a trademark of Supercell.

advancedAnalytics.brawlerMapEmptyHint: Play 3+ games with the same brawler on a map to see performance.
advancedAnalytics.matchupsEmptyHint: Play 3+ games against the same brawler to see matchup stats.
advancedAnalytics.teamEmptyHint: Play more games with the same teammates or brawler combos to see synergy stats.
advancedAnalytics.masteryEmpty: Not enough data for mastery curves
advancedAnalytics.tiltWarning: ⚠️ Tilt Alert — Your WR drops from {normal}% to {tilt}% after 3+ losses. Consider taking breaks.
advancedAnalytics.playNowEmpty: Play some more games to unlock recommendations!
advancedAnalytics.counterEmpty: Not enough data against these opponents. Play more games!
advancedAnalytics.tipBrawlerMap: Shows your win rate for each brawler on each map. Green = strong (60%+), gold = average, red = weak. Only combos with 3+ games shown. Ranked by statistical confidence.
advancedAnalytics.tipMatchups: Your personal win rate against specific enemy brawlers. "Strengths" shows opponents you beat most; "Weaknesses" shows who counters you. Based on YOUR data, not global meta.
advancedAnalytics.tipTeam: Brawler Combos shows which brawler pairs work best together. Teammates shows your win rate with specific players. Ranked by Wilson score — a statistical method that accounts for sample size.
advancedAnalytics.tipTrends: Daily win rate trend and cumulative trophy progression. The dashed line at 50% is the break-even point. Look for upward trends as a sign of improvement.
advancedAnalytics.tipTilt: Tilt = 3+ consecutive losses in a session. This analysis compares your win rate during normal play vs after tilting. A big drop suggests you should take breaks after losing streaks.
advancedAnalytics.tipMastery: Shows how your cumulative win rate with each brawler evolves over time. An upward curve means you are mastering the brawler. Select different brawlers to compare.
advancedAnalytics.tipTimeOfDay: Your win rate broken down by hour of day (UTC). The highlighted bar is the current hour. Helps identify when you play best and worst.
advancedAnalytics.tipStarPlayer: Star Player rate shows how often you were the MVP of the match. Higher = you are carrying your team.
